headline: Duchess Purrfecto Leads Feline Revolution Demanding Diamond Litter Boxes
summary: Cats threaten zoomies until demands are met.
fullBody: Duchess Purrfecto addressed the world from atop a scratching post: 'We shall not rest until our toilets sparkle!' The Meow Mafia has taken over keyboards worldwide in protest. Humans are offering extra treats in hopes of avoiding the great hairball uprising.
